meta.title: Obsidian Note Style Moodboard
meta.subtitle: Visual language for long-term engineering notes
meta.summary: A restrained, technical, study-friendly visual world for an obsidian-note-style skill: layered notes, engineering diagrams, callouts, tables, code references, and review surfaces.
meta.goal: Create visual references for a skill that turns long-term notes into readable, layered, review-friendly knowledge assets.
meta.audience: Mechanical and vehicle engineering graduate student learning C/C++, embedded systems, ROS, chassis-by-wire, and engineering workflows.
meta.palette: off-white paper, graphite gray, deep green, muted cyan, steel blue, occasional amber warning accents
meta.avoid: readable UI text, logos, fake Obsidian screenshots, collage layouts, dense scrapbook visuals, over-decorated stationery, neon cyberpunk, generic AI dashboard aesthetics

visual_language: paper and digital hybrid knowledge systems
format_rules: one single visual reference image per tile

items.title: Structured Engineering Notebook
items.caption: Notebook and desk planning reference for structured long-term notes.
items.bestFor: Heading hierarchy, margin rhythm, structured note surfaces
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of an open engineering notebook on a clean desk, with abstract diagrams and margin marks; no readable text, no logos.

items.title: Callout Layering System
items.caption: Layered sticky-note reference for callouts, warnings, tips, and examples.
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of translucent tabs and colored annotation flags layered over technical notes; no readable text, no UI.

items.title: Code And Concept Pairing
items.caption: Laptop-plus-notebook reference for pairing implementation with explanation.
items.bestFor: Code blocks next to conceptual explanation
items.prompt: Single composed scene with a laptop showing blurred code-like shapes beside handwritten concept sketches; no readable code, no logos.

items.title: ASCII Diagram Feeling
items.caption: Whiteboard structure reference for box-and-arrow thinking.
items.bestFor: ASCII diagrams, flow explanation, module relationships
items.prompt: Single minimalist photograph of a whiteboard with simple abstract box-and-arrow technical structure; no readable text, no labels.

items.title: Engineering Decision Table
items.caption: Engineering tools and paper reference for comparison tables and tradeoff frameworks.
items.prompt: Single overhead photograph of a comparison-table-like document with technical objects and restrained color; no readable text.

items.title: Debugging Trail
items.caption: Electronics desk reference for embedded troubleshooting notes.
items.bestFor: Failure analysis, checklist flow, embedded troubleshooting
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of a methodical troubleshooting setup with notebook, electronics, and waveform-like screen; no labels or logos.

items.title: Long-Term Knowledge Archive
items.caption: Index-card reference for durable personal knowledge storage.
items.bestFor: Long-term recall structure and review cards
items.prompt: Single photograph of carefully arranged index cards and binders for a personal knowledge archive; no readable text.

items.title: Review And Recall Surface
items.caption: Study desk reference for spaced review and recall prompts.
items.bestFor: 复盘、错题、间隔重复、记忆触发
items.prompt: Single image of spaced-review cards laid out beside a notebook, with subtle marks and a pencil; no readable text.

items.title: Technical Callout Cards
items.caption: Card layout reference for note, tip, warning, and example blocks.
items.bestFor: Callout taxonomy, visual chunking, note block systems
items.prompt: Single scene of physical note cards on a desk, differentiated by color strip and simple geometric marks; no readable text.

items.title: Vehicle Control Systems Map
items.caption: Systems-thinking reference for vehicle/chassis control diagrams.
items.bestFor: 控制链路、传感器-控制器-执行器结构、模块关系
items.prompt: Single whiteboard-style scene with abstract vehicle control blocks, sensors, arrows, and controller modules; no readable labels.

items.title: Readable Markdown Craft
items.caption: Printed-document reference for markdown hierarchy, code blocks, tables, and side panels.
items.bestFor: Markdown formatting, code blocks, side notes, table rhythm
items.prompt: Single close-up of a markdown-like technical document printed on paper with structure blocks, code-shaped bars, side panels, and table shapes; no readable text.

items.title: Calm Builder Desk
items.caption: Clean long-session desk reference for building notes, code, and engineering understanding.
items.bestFor: Overall mood: calm, long-term, practical, engineering-focused
items.prompt: Single editorial photograph of a focused engineering study desk with keyboard, notebook, electronics, sketch, and reference tabs; no readable text.
